name: Formulaires gigarun.re (devis + contact)

parameters.jsCode:
const html = $json.devisHtml || '<html><body>Devis</body></html>';
return [{ json: $json, binary: { data: { data: Buffer.from(html).toString('base64'), mimeType: 'text/html', fileName: 'index.html' } } }];

_doc: Webhook -> Preparer (HTML+PDF source) -> [Repondre OK, Email interne, Est un devis]. Branche devis: HTML->binaire -> Gotenberg (PDF) -> Email client (devis joint). Credential SMTP: smtpOvhGiga01 (dev OVH). Prod: dupliquer le credential en Mailjet. Dolibarr (prospect+devis) a ajouter en phase prod (cf README).
